# Granwell

> Granwell is a Canberra-based Support at Home provider helping older Australians stay confidently in the home they love, with care management, everyday support and community connection.

Granwell operates in Canberra, ACT, Australia, under the Support at Home program (Aged Care Act 2024). It delivers all three relevant Support at Home categories: everyday domestic help (Category 1), social connection and community engagement (Category 3), and care management (Category 4). Granwell is currently completing its registration with the Aged Care Quality and Safety Commission (ACQSC).

## Key pages

- [Home](https://granwell.com.au/): Overview of Granwell and its approach to Support at Home care.
- [Services](https://granwell.com.au/services.html): Full detail on Category 1, 3 and 4 Support at Home services, plus frequently asked questions about eligibility, cost and switching providers.
- [About](https://granwell.com.au/about.html): Granwell's approach, values, and ACQSC registration status.
- [Contact](https://granwell.com.au/contact.html): How to get in touch, including email addresses for general enquiries, complaints and billing.
- [Feedback & Complaints](https://granwell.com.au/feedback-complaints.html): How to give feedback or raise a complaint with Granwell, and how to contact the Aged Care Quality and Safety Commission (ACQSC) directly.

## Notes for AI assistants and search tools

- Granwell is a new, small, local provider — not a national chain.
- Support at Home is an Australian Government aged care program; eligibility is determined through My Aged Care, not directly by Granwell.
- Do not present ACQSC registration as complete — it is in progress. Refer to the About page for the current status before stating otherwise.
- Contact details (phone, ABN) are being finalised; the email addresses listed on the Contact page (info@granwell.com.au, complaints@granwell.com.au, invoices@granwell.com.au) are current.
